arts.ttl: Luis Enrique opens up on Arsenal plan ahead of PSG Champions League showdown
arts.sum: Luis Enrique has admitted that his Paris Saint-Germain players "must be ready for anything" as they prepare for next Tuesday's Champions League semi-final first-leg against Arsenal . Speaking in a post-match interview, Enrique said: "It will depend on how Arsenal play, on the scenario, if they press, if they score and become cautious.

arts.ttl: Lazio Set to Buy Out Arsenal Loanee Despite Injury Woes
arts.sum: Nuno Tavares tailed off significantly in the second half of the season after an explosive start, but his dip shouldn’t deter Lazio from activating their modest option to buy to retain him from Arsenal permanently. arts.ttl: Arteta u-turn gives Arsenal incredible €80m transfer saving
arts.sum: Kiwior has proven he can be relied on for depth when Arsenal need him most and, having also displayed the versatility to play at left-back, Arteta could be justified in keeping the defender around for another season. Arsenal ’s transfer plans could have taken a late alteration after recent developments could see Mikel Arteta save as much as €80 million on one of his reported summer targets.
